title: helianthemum × mansanetianum nothosubsp. ayorense
intro: Helianthemum × mansanetianum nothosubsp. ayorense is a hybrid plant species within the Helianthemum genus, commonly known as rockrose or sunrose. This plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum × mansanetianum nothosubsp. ayorense include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in water or other solvents to extract its active compounds.
